home.hero_subtitle: The open-source password manager with Dual-Lock protocol. You control 100% of your data. The server sees nothing.
home.step2_desc: A master password + your automatically generated local key.
home.step3_desc: Personal, Work, Crypto... each compartment is isolated and encrypted.
home.step4_desc: Your data is untouchable. Even by us.
home.trust_subtitle: Click a badge to understand in simple terms.
home.trust_opensource_desc: Our code is public. Verify for yourself that we don't lie. Every line is auditable by anyone.
home.trust_xchacha_desc: The same encryption used by the most secure systems in the world. Your data is noise to a hacker.
home.trust_argon_desc: Your password is strengthened billions of times before being used. Brute force attacks are useless.
home.trust_zerologs_desc: We don't know who you are. No plaintext email, no name, no trace. Even under legal pressure, we have nothing to give.
home.cta_title: Your data deserves better than a recycled password.
home.cta_subtitle: Join those who took back control.
home.cta_btn: Download SaladVault - Free and Open Source
home.cta_platforms: Windows · macOS · Linux · No credit card required

about.pain_title: Because it doesn't only happen to others.
about.pain1_desc: In 2025, massive breaches exposed hundreds of millions of accounts. A single reused password = all your accounts compromised in minutes.
about.pain2_desc: Browsers store your passwords with minimal protection. A thief accesses them in 30 seconds with a simple free tool.
about.pain3_desc: Popular managers have been hacked. 25 million encrypted vaults stolen. If the key is on their servers, your data is at risk.
about.philosophy_title: What if your manager was the weak link?
about.philosophy_subtitle: Most managers keep the key to YOUR data on THEIR servers.
about.vs_classic3: If hacked → all your data exposed
about.vs_sv2: Master password + local device key. Both stay with you, never on our servers.
about.zk_desc: The server never sees your data in plain text.
about.dual_desc: Two cryptographic factors required to decrypt.
about.os_desc: Open source code, auditable by all.
about.sov_desc: Hosted in France (OVH), end-to-end encrypted data.

features.hero_title: Built for paranoids. Used by everyone.
features.duallock_desc: Your master password and your device key. Both are required. Even if our servers are compromised, without your local key, your data is gibberish.
features.saladier_desc: Each Saladier is an independent encrypted vault. A breach in one compartment doesn't affect the others. Organize by context: Personal, Work, Crypto.
features.feat_encryption_desc: XChaCha20-Poly1305 with 24-byte nonces. The same standard used by the most secure systems.
features.feat_kdf_desc: Argon2id with 64 MB memory, 3 iterations. Brute force is computationally impossible.
features.feat_recovery_desc: 24-word phrase to recover your local key on a new device. Print it, keep it safe.
features.feat_import_desc: Import from LastPass, 1Password (CSV). Export encrypted or plain CSV.
features.feat_clipboard_desc: Copied passwords are automatically cleared from clipboard after 30 seconds.
features.feat_screenshot_desc: The app window is protected from screen capture and recording.
features.feat_deadman_desc: Automatically send your recovery data to a trusted contact if you stop responding.
features.feat_generator_desc: Random or passphrase. Configurable length, character sets, and word count.

pricing.subtitle: No trial period. No credit card. No catch.
pricing.faq1_q: What happens if I lose my device?
pricing.faq1_a: When creating your account, SaladVault generates a 24-word recovery phrase. This phrase can regenerate your local key on a new device. Print it and keep it safe - it's your safety net.
pricing.faq2_q: Is it really free? Where's the catch?
pricing.faq2_a: The Jardinier plan is free forever, with no limits on local Saladiers or Feuilles. Our model is freemium: advanced features (cloud sync, shared Saladiers) will be paid, but the core app remains free.
pricing.faq3_q: How does it work if you don't know my email?
pricing.faq3_a: Your email is hashed (transformed into an irreversible code) on your device BEFORE being sent to our server. We only receive an anonymous identifier. This is Blind Indexing: we can identify you without knowing who you are.
pricing.faq4_q: What if SaladVault disappears one day?
pricing.faq4_a: SaladVault is 100% Open Source. Even if the company disappears, the code remains public and usable. Plus, your data is stored locally on your device - it belongs to you, not us.
pricing.faq5_q: Is my master password stored somewhere?
pricing.faq5_a: Never. Your master password is never stored, not in plain text, not encrypted. It's used to derive an encryption key in RAM, then immediately erased from memory (via Zeroize). Nobody - not even us - can recover it.
pricing.faq6_q: Why trust you instead of Dashlane?
pricing.faq6_a: Don't trust us. Verify. Our code is Open Source: every line is auditable. Our Dual-Lock architecture means even if our servers are compromised, your data is useless without your local key. We technically cannot read your data.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1_text: By downloading, installing, or using SaladVault (the "Software"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the Software.
terms.s2_text: SaladVault is a Zero-Knowledge password manager with a Dual-Lock protocol. The Software encrypts all data locally on your device before any transmission. We have no ability to access, read, or recover your encrypted data.
terms.s3_p1: You are solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your master password and your device key (Ingredient Secret).
terms.s3_p2: You are responsible for securely storing your BIP39 recovery phrase. If you lose both your device key and recovery phrase, your data is permanently irrecoverable. SaladVault cannot help you recover it.
terms.s3_p3: You must not use the Software for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws.
terms.s4_text: SaladVault operates on a Zero-Knowledge basis. Your master password is never transmitted to or stored on our servers. Your email is hashed via Blind Indexing before reaching our servers. We cannot access your vault contents under any circumstances, including law enforcement requests.
terms.s5_p1: The Jardinier (free) plan provides unlimited local storage with no expiration.
terms.s5_p2: Paid plans (Maraicher Pro, Potager Familial) are billed monthly via Stripe. You may cancel at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
terms.s5_p3: We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days advance notice. Existing subscriptions are honored at their current rate until renewal.
terms.s6_text: SaladVault is licensed under AGPL-3.0. The source code is publicly available. You may audit, fork, and modify the code in accordance with the license terms. The AGPL-3.0 license governs the use of the source code; these Terms govern your use of the hosted service and distributed binaries.
terms.s7_text: Your data belongs to you. All vault entries are encrypted client-side with XChaCha20-Poly1305 before storage or transmission. We store only encrypted blobs and anonymous identifiers. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
terms.s8_p1: The local application functions entirely offline and does not depend on our servers.
terms.s8_p2: Cloud sync features (paid plans) depend on server availability. We target 99.9% uptime but provide no guarantees. Scheduled maintenance will be announced in advance.
terms.s9_text: SaladVault is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any data loss, security breach resulting from user negligence (weak master password, compromised device, lost recovery phrase), or any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
terms.s10_text: You may stop using SaladVault at any time. Your local data remains yours. We may suspend cloud sync access for violation of these terms or non-payment, but we will never delete your local data.
terms.s11_text: These Terms are governed by the laws of France. Any disputes shall be submitted to the competent courts of France.
terms.s12_text: We may update these Terms from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the Software after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s13_text: For questions about these Terms, contact us via our GitHub repository: github.com/salad-vault

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: SaladVault is designed to know as little about you as possible. This Privacy Policy explains what we collect, what we don't, and why.
privacy.s1_text: SaladVault is a Zero-Knowledge application. This means we are technically incapable of reading your data. All encryption and decryption happens on your device. Our servers only see encrypted blobs and anonymous identifiers.
privacy.s2_p1: Your master password - never transmitted, never stored, erased from memory after use (Zeroize)
privacy.s2_p2: Your email in plain text - only a HMAC-SHA256 hash (Blind Index) reaches our server
privacy.s2_p3: Your vault entries (passwords, usernames, URLs, notes) - encrypted client-side before storage
privacy.s2_p4: Your device key (Ingredient Secret) - never leaves your device
privacy.s2_p5: Browsing history, keystrokes, clipboard contents, or screen captures
privacy.s3_p1: Blind Index: an anonymous, irreversible identifier derived from your email via HMAC-SHA256. Used to identify your account without knowing your email.
privacy.s3_p2: Encrypted vault blob: your vault data encrypted with XChaCha20-Poly1305. We cannot decrypt it.
privacy.s3_p3: Authentication hash: derived from your password via Argon2id. We cannot reverse it to obtain your password.
privacy.s3_p4: Stripe customer ID: for payment processing. We do not store credit card numbers.
privacy.s3_p5: Timestamps: account creation date and last activity date (for Dead Man's Switch).
privacy.s3_p6: Dead Man's Switch recipient email: stored in plain text only if you enable this feature, as it is required to send the recovery email.
privacy.s4_text: If you use the free Jardinier plan, no data ever leaves your device. We collect absolutely nothing. Your vault is stored in a local SQLite database on your machine.
privacy.s5_p1: Stripe: payment processing for paid plans. Stripe's privacy policy applies to payment data.
privacy.s5_p2: OVH (France): server hosting. All servers are located in France.
privacy.s5_p3: We do not use any analytics, tracking, advertising, or telemetry services. No Google Analytics, no Facebook Pixel, no cookies.
privacy.s6_p1: All server data is stored on OVH infrastructure in France.
privacy.s6_p2: Database access is restricted and encrypted at rest.
privacy.s6_p4: Even in the event of a complete server breach, your vault data remains encrypted and unusable without your master password AND your device key.
privacy.s7_text: Your encrypted vault data is retained as long as your account exists. Upon account deletion, all server-side data (encrypted blobs, blind index, tokens) is permanently deleted. Local data on your device is yours to manage.
privacy.s8_p1: Right of access: you can export all your data at any time via the application.
privacy.s8_p2: Right to erasure: you can delete your account and all server-side data.
privacy.s8_p3: Right to portability: export in CSV or encrypted JSON format.
privacy.s8_p4: Note: due to our Zero-Knowledge architecture, we cannot identify which data belongs to you without your authentication. We cannot fulfill data access requests based solely on an email address, because we don't store email addresses.
privacy.s9_text: If compelled by French law to provide user data, we can only provide encrypted blobs and anonymous identifiers. We cannot provide decrypted vault contents, plaintext emails, or master passwords, because we do not have them. Our Warrant Canary is published on our website.
privacy.s10_text: SaladVault is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from children.
privacy.s11_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page. Since we collect minimal data, changes are expected to be rare.
privacy.s12_text: For privacy-related questions, contact us via our GitHub repository: github.com/salad-vault

footer.warrant_tooltip: No government order received to date.
footer.made_with: Built with Rust - For those who trust no one.
